title: extract api_url+account_id into private helper
description: Every one of the 11 methods in methods.rs opens with the same two lines: let api_url = &session.api_url; and let account_id = session.chat_account_id().ok_or_else(|| ClientError::InvalidSession(no chat account_id))?. This is repeated verbatim 11 times. A private helper on JmapChatClient: fn session_parts<'s>(session: &'s Session) -> Result<(&'s str, &'s str), ClientError> returning (api_url, account_id) would eliminate the duplication and ensure consistent error text. Call sites collapse to: let (api_url, account_id) = Self::session_parts(session)?.
